title: Frontend Application Configuration
description: Configuration schema for the frontend application including authentication, API endpoints, and runtime settings

auth.description: Authentication configuration for MSAL (Microsoft Authentication Library)

clientId.description: Azure AD application (client) ID in UUID format

authority.description: Azure AD authority URL including tenant ID (e.g., https://login.microsoftonline.com/{tenant-id})

redirectUri.description: OAuth redirect URI - must be registered in Azure AD app registration

scopes.description: OAuth scopes to request during authentication

wsSignEndpoint.description: WebSocket signing endpoint URL (optional, can be empty string)

maxAuthRetries.description: Maximum number of authentication retry attempts

cookieExpirationMinutes.description: Cookie expiration time in minutes (1-1440, where 1440 = 24 hours)
